hero.imageAlt: Holy Queen's Way landscape at sunset
hero.description: The Holy Queen's Way: Where history meets serenity. Explore Portugal's untamed landscapes and savor the rich heritage of a path built on peace and tradition.

pathSelection.title: Choose Your Path
pathSelection.description: Whether you prefer the slow rhythm of walking or the speed of gravel biking, the Queen's Way offers a unique perspective.

notFound.title: Path not found
notFound.description: The path you are looking for does not exist or does not have details available yet.

pathsPage.title: Our Paths
pathsPage.subtitle: Explore the historical trails and stunning landscapes of the Holy Queen.
pathsPage.empty: No paths found for this filter.

map.interact: Tap to interact with the map

default.title: Paths of the Saint Queen - Faith, Nature, and History Trails
default.description: Explore the Paths of the Saint Queen: trails of faith, history, and nature between Quintanilha and Trancoso. Detailed info for hiking, pilgrimage, and bikepacking in Portugal.

paths.title: Our Routes | Paths of the Saint Queen
paths.description: Discover all the Saint Queen trails. Planned routes for pilgrims and bikepacking enthusiasts.
